bottles.desc: Russell's Reserve 15 Year Old Limited Release Bourbon Experience the Art of Bourbon Maturation Russell's Reserve 15 Year Old Limited Release Bourbon is a true masterpiece, showcasing the pinnacle of bourbon craftsmanship. This exquisite spirit is the result of 15 years of careful aging in charred American oak barrels, under the expert guidance of Master Distiller Eddie Russell. Each bottle captures the essence of time, offering a rich tapestry of flavors with pronounced notes of seasoned oak and deep vanilla undertones. A Bold Yet Refined Spirit This bourbon is crafted for those whoâ¦
bottles.name: Russell's Reserve 15 Year Old Limited Release Bourbon

bottles.desc: 15 years. Batch 1. Limited Release. Russell's Reserve — the founding release of Wild Turkey's most age-forward Russell's Reserve expression, two full years beyond the 13 Year Barrel Proof program and the deepest age statement in the Russell's Reserve lineup. The Russell's Reserve 15 Year Limited Release pushes two years beyond the 13 Year Barrel Proof — approaching the maturity of the Gold Foil era Wild Turkey expressions in the collection. The founding Batch 1 establishes the baseline for the entire 15-year program. Specs Distillery: Wild Turkey Distillery, Lawrenceburg, Kentucky Style:â¦
bottles.name: Russell's Reserve 15 Year Old Limited Release Bourbon Batch 1

bottles.desc: Russell's Reserve Single Barrel is a non-chill-filtered, single barrel Kentucky bourbon bottled at 110 proof — drawing on the Russell family's decades of distilling expertise at Wild Turkey for a bold, vibrant, and rounded character. Each bottle is drawn from a single hand-selected barrel and bottled without chill filtration to preserve the full texture and flavor. The result is clean on the palate yet bold — honey-kissed citrus, summer fruits, crisp mint, and cinnamon balanced by creamy vanilla and soft toffee. It is best enjoyed neat or with a single cube of ice to appreciate theâ¦
bottles.name: Russell's Reserve Single Barrel Bourbon

bottles.desc: Russell's Reserve 13 Year Old returns for Spring 2026 with a commemorative label honoring Master Distiller Eddie Russell's 45th anniversary, bottled at a barrel proof of 60.6% (121.2 proof). This limited release marks 45 years of Eddie Russell's work at Wild Turkey Distilling Co. in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. What began in 1981 as a summer job became a lifelong calling, and today Eddie stands as a Hall of Fame Master Distiller whose approach has helped shape modern bourbon. Russell's Reserve itself was first created by Eddie to honor his father, Jimmy Russell, making this anniversary edition aâ¦
bottles.name: Russell’s Reserve 13-Year Bourbon Eddie’s 45th Anniversary

bottles.desc: Russell's Reserve Single Rickhouse 2022 — Camp Nelson C. A limited annual release from Wild Turkey selecting barrels exclusively from a single rickhouse location, with Camp Nelson C being one of the most historically significant warehouse sites in the Wild Turkey aging system. Camp Nelson is one of Wild Turkey's off-site aging campuses in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky — named for a Civil War-era freedmen's settlement that stood near the current warehouse location. Camp Nelson C is a specific rick house at that campus, and this 2022 Single Rickhouse release draws entirely from barrels aged in thatâ¦
bottles.name: Russell’s Reserve Single Rickhouse 2022 Camp Nelson C Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Russell's Reserve Single Rickhouse Camp Nelson F is the second release in Wild Turkey's Single Rickhouse series — a barrel-proof Kentucky Straight Bourbon drawn entirely from the center-cut floors 4 and 5 of the Camp Nelson F rickhouse, bottled at 117.6 proof and non-chill filtered. The Single Rickhouse series explores how a specific barrel resting place shapes a whiskey's final character — each annual release drawn entirely from one rickhouse. The 2023 Camp Nelson F edition is a small batch from the warehouse's center-cut floors, where more stable temperatures produce a deep, balancedâ¦
bottles.name: Russell’s Reserve Single Rickhouse 2023 Camp Nelson F Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: All barrels from a single rickhouse. Russell's Reserve Single Rickhouse 2024 — Camp Nelson Rickhouse B. Jimmy and Eddie Russell's most terroir-specific bourbon, demonstrating what one warehouse's unique aging environment produces when isolated from every other barrel on the property. Russell's Reserve is the ultra-premium tier of Wild Turkey — Jimmy Russell and his son Eddie Russell's personal selection program, above the standard Wild Turkey lineup. The Single Rickhouse expression takes the single warehouse concept further than any Russell's Reserve release: every barrel in the blend comesâ¦
bottles.name: Russell’s Reserve Single Rickhouse 2024 Camp Nelson B Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: 2025. Camp Nelson E. Single Rickhouse. Russell’s Reserve — the 2025 annual release in Wild Turkey’s Single Rickhouse program, selecting the entire production of a single named rickhouse — Camp Nelson Rickhouse E — to express how Wild Turkey’s warehouse environment shapes bourbon character. The Single Rickhouse program is Russell’s Reserve’s most environmentally specific release, going beyond single barrel to present the combined output of a single rickhouse in a single year. Camp Nelson is one of Wild Turkey’s maturation warehouse sites, and Rickhouse E is the specific building within thatâ¦
bottles.name: Russell’s Reserve Single Rickhouse 2025 Camp Nelson E Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 101 is the brand's flagship Kentucky straight bourbon, bottled at 101 proof for a lean, earthy, high-proof character that has earned it a reputation well beyond the bar well. Wild Turkey 101 leads with corn and waxy honey on the nose, with a deep chunk of earthy rye behind it. It is not overly sweet in the mouth — leaner and almost leathery — and carries through to a long, strong finish where a spike of mint appears. The extra proof gives it the backbone to stand up neat, over ice, or in a cocktail without losing its identity. It is far more than the everyday shot bourbon it isâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 101 Bourbon

bottles.desc: 101 proof. 12 years. 1991. Wild Turkey 12 Year Cuvée La Fayette — a French-market export expression of Wild Turkey 12 Year at 101 proof, bottled in 1991 and presented under the Cuvée La Fayette label for French distribution. Now over 30 years from original bottling. Wild Turkey produced market-specific bottlings for European and Japanese distribution during the 1980s and early 1990s — a period when aged American whiskey found its most receptive audiences outside the domestic market. The Cuvée La Fayette designation references the Marquis de Lafayette, the French military officer who fought inâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year 101 Proof Cuvée La Fayette French Release 1991

bottles.desc: *bottle only, no box* Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 101 Proof Distiller's Reserve is a long-matured Kentucky Straight Bourbon from Jimmy and Eddie Russell — selected from the distiller's reserve, barreled at a lower entry proof and matured for 12 years before bottling at 101 proof. This is a pre-modern era Wild Turkey 12 Year expression at the full 101 proof, drawing on the distillery's high-rye mashbill and the deep char maturation that defines the house style. The extended age develops a rich, layered profile while the 101 proof keeps the Wild Turkey backbone intact. Tasting Notes Nose: Vanilla,â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 101 Proof Distillers Reserve Bourbon

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1985 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon — the 1985 vintage of the Gold Foil series, distilled circa 1973 and bottled 12 years later. The oldest Gold Foil expression in the current Wooden Cork Wild Turkey vintage collection, now over 40 years from original bottling. The Gold Foil label was Wild Turkey's premium aged tier label from the early 1980s through the early 1990s, identifying 12-year expressions produced primarily for export markets during the pre-revival American whiskey era. The 1985 vintage is the earliest Gold Foil in the current Wooden Cork collection —â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1985 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey (1st Release)

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1976. Bottled 1988. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil — the second-oldest vintage in the Wooden Cork Wild Turkey Gold Foil collection, three years newer than the 1985 and from the same iconic 1980s production era. The 1988 Gold Foil represents Wild Turkey 12 Year at the height of its pre-revival era — bourbon before the modern craft and allocated premium era, when Wild Turkey's consistent 101-proof production was the standard for quality American bourbon without the cultural stratification that followed. Now nearly 40 years from original bottling. Specs Distillery: Wild Turkeyâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1988 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey (2nd Release)

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1977. Bottled 1989. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil 1989 — the mid-decade Gold Foil vintage in the Wooden Cork collection, between the 1988 and the two 1991 expressions. The 1989 bottling is from the final years of the Gold Foil era's classic decade — Wild Turkey 12 Year at its 1980s production peak, before the bourbon renaissance transformed how the category was perceived and valued. Now over 35 years from original bottling. Specs Distillery: Wild Turkey Distillery, Lawrenceburg, Kentucky Style: Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey Distilled: circa 1977 Bottled: 1989 Age: 12â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1989 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1978. Bottled 1990. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil — the 1990 vintage of the Gold Foil series, three years older than the 1992 (the most recent in the collection) and two years newer than the 1988. The 1990 fills the middle of the six-vintage Gold Foil collection at Wooden Cork. The Wild Turkey Gold Foil 1990 is from the heart of the Gold Foil era — not the earliest (1985) nor the most recent (1992), but a fully representative expression of the program's high-rye, 101-proof pre-revival production at 12 years. Distilled circa 1978, bottled 1990, now over 35 years fromâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1990 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1979. Bottled 1991. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil — the standard 1991 expression in the Wooden Cork Gold Foil collection, paired with the 1991 Red Bird variant for a within-year comparison of two different 1991 Wild Turkey 12 Year presentations. Together with the Red Bird, the standard 1991 Gold Foil documents the same production year in two distinct presentation formats — an unusual collector opportunity to compare two expressions from the same vintage distillation cohort at different packaging presentations. Both are now over 30 years from original bottling. Specsâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1991 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1979. Bottled 1991. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil — Red Bird variant. The distinctive Red Bird packaging identifies this 1991 expression as a specific presentation variant within the Gold Foil era, distinct from the standard 1991 Gold Foil also in the Wooden Cork collection. The Red Bird name and associated packaging is specific to a particular market or presentation variant of the Wild Turkey 12 Year from this era — making this 1991 bottling distinct from the standard 1991 Gold Foil. Together the Red Bird and standard 1991 expressions provide a within-year comparison ofâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1991 Gold Foil Red Bird Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1980. Bottled 1992. Wild Turkey 12 Year Old Gold Foil — the most recent and most approachable vintage in the Wooden Cork Wild Turkey Gold Foil vertical, from the same 1980s-era production program as the 1985, 1988, 1989, and 1991 expressions. The 1992 is the youngest vintage in the current six-bottle Gold Foil collection — approximately seven years newer than the 1985 founding edition. Together the full collection spans 1985 through 1992, a seven-year window of the pre-modern era Wild Turkey 12 Year production captured in the iconic Gold Foil packaging of that decade. Now overâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1992 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: 12 years. 1993. Gold Foil. Wild Turkey — a pre-revival era expression from the 1993 Gold Foil series, now over 30 years from original bottling and among the oldest Wild Turkey expressions in the current Wooden Cork collection. The Gold Foil label identified Wild Turkey's premium aged tier during the 1980s and early 1990s — a period when the distillery was producing bourbon largely for an export-focused market before the domestic American whiskey revival transformed consumer demand. The 1993 vintage sits at the tail end of this era, produced when 12-year Wild Turkey was a routine agedâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 12 Year Old 1993 Gold Foil Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — 1989 Bottling — is a vintage Wild Turkey expression from the peak Jimmy Russell era, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. At approximately 36 years old as a sealed bottle, this is a genuinely rare collector expression from one of American whiskey’s most storied distilleries. Late 1980s Wild Turkey 101 is among the most prized vintage American bourbon bottlings. The high-rye mashbill at 101 proof with 8 years of Kentucky aging delivers the classic Wild Turkey flavor in its most expressive era: caramel, vanilla, pronouncedâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 1989

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — 1991 Bottling — is a vintage expression of Wild Turkey’s classic high-rye bourbon from the Jimmy Russell era, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. This sealed bottle is approximately 35 years old and represents one of American whiskey’s most historically significant and collected expressions. The high-rye mashbill at 101 proof with 8 years of Kentucky aging delivers the bold, spice-forward character that defines Wild Turkey’s classic house style: caramel, vanilla, pronounced rye spice, toasted oak, and the signature Wildâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 1991

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — Bottled 5/24/94 — is a vintage Wild Turkey expression from May 1994 with the specific bottling date stamped on the label, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. A sealed collector bottle from the mid-1990s Jimmy Russell era. Mid-1990s Wild Turkey 101 at 8 years is among the most sought vintage American bourbon bottlings — the high-rye mashbill at 101 proof delivers caramel, vanilla, pronounced rye spice, and toasted oak in the classic Wild Turkey house style. Tasting Notes Rich caramel, rye spice, and toasted oak on theâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 5/24/94

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — Bottled 5/26/93 — is a vintage Wild Turkey expression from May 1993 with the specific bottling date stamped on the label, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. A sealed collector bottle from the classic Jimmy Russell era of Wild Turkey production. Early 1990s Wild Turkey 101 is a collector’s staple — the high-rye mashbill at 101 proof with Kentucky aging delivers the classic Wild Turkey flavor profile in its most expressive form. The specific bottling date on the label makes this bottle individually identifiable andâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 5/26/93

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — Bottled 6/05/95 — is a vintage Wild Turkey expression from June 1995 with the specific bottling date stamped on the label, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. A sealed collector bottle from the mid-1990s Jimmy Russell era, approximately 30 years old. Mid-1990s Wild Turkey 101 is among the most prized vintage bourbon bottlings for collectors who value the bold, spice-forward character of this production period. The high-rye mashbill at 101 proof delivers caramel, vanilla, rye spice, and toasted oak in the classic Wildâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 6/05/95

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof — Bottled 8/10/94 — is a vintage Wild Turkey expression from August 1994 with the specific bottling date stamped on the label, distilled and bottled at Camp Nelson Distillery in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky. A sealed collector bottle from the mid-1990s Jimmy Russell era. Mid-1990s Wild Turkey 101 represents a period of production widely celebrated by vintage bourbon collectors. The high-rye mashbill at 101 proof delivers the bold, spice-forward, and richly oaked character that defines classic Wild Turkey. Approximately 30 years old as a sealed bottle. Tasting Notesâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 101 Proof 8/10/94

bottles.desc: Distilled circa 1976. Bottled 1988. Wild Turkey 8 Year 1988 Straight Bourbon Whiskey 1 Liter — a vintage one-liter format expression of Wild Turkey 8 Year from 1988, now nearly 40 years from original bottling. The 8-year age statement and 1988 vintage place this in the pre-modern era Wild Turkey production under the original Lawrenceburg formula. The 1988 Wild Turkey 8 Year is from the same production era as the Gold Foil 12 Year vintages in the collection (1985, 1988, 1989, 1990, 1991, 1992) — the high-rye, 101-proof style that defines classic Wild Turkey before the modern era. At 8 yearsâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year 1988 Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof is the classic pre-modern era 8-year expression of Wild Turkey's high-rye Kentucky Straight Bourbon — aged a minimum of eight years and bottled at the iconic 101 proof under Master Distiller Jimmy Russell. This is the small-batch 8-year, 101-proof Wild Turkey that defined the brand's classic house style — a robust yet balanced bourbon built on the distillery's high-rye mashbill and deep-char maturation. Bold enough to sip neat, with the backbone to carry a splash of water or a cocktail. Tasting Notes Nose: Caramel, toasted nuts, citrus peel, and sweet charredâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey 8 Year Old 101 Proof

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey American Honey is a honey-infused whiskey liqueur — Wild Turkey bourbon blended with real honey for a smooth, sweet, easy-drinking spirit. American Honey pairs the Wild Turkey bourbon base with natural honey, producing a balanced liqueur with honey, gentle spice, and a touch of lemon zest. It is softer and sweeter than straight bourbon, designed for easy sipping and simple serves. It is excellent chilled, over ice, or as a shot, and adds a honeyed note to cocktails. Tasting Notes Nose: Honey with baked bread and corn. Palate: Smooth and balanced — honey, gentle spice, and lemonâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey American Honey Bourbon

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Austin Nichols Archives Gold Foil Edition is a 16-year, 120-proof Kentucky Straight Bourbon — the debut release of Wild Turkey's Austin Nichols Archives Collection. The Austin Nichols Archives Collection is a limited-edition annual series honoring the most iconic bottles in Wild Turkey's history, and the first series led by Associate Master Blender Bruce Russell. The inaugural Gold Foil Edition is a 16-year-old, non-chill filtered bourbon inspired by the collector-favorite vintage "Cheesy Gold Foil" releases of the 1980s and 1990s, built around longer aging and higher proof toâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Austin Nichols Archives 16 Year Gold Foil Whiskey

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Bourbon (formerly Wild Turkey 81) is a Kentucky Straight Bourbon aged in American white oak barrels with the deepest No. 4 alligator char, under Master Distiller Eddie Russell. The entry point to the Wild Turkey range, this is the distillery's high-rye mashbill at an approachable, mixable strength. The deep No. 4 char gives it Wild Turkey's signature vanilla, caramel, and oak character in a smoother, more versatile format than the higher-proof 101. Tasting Notes Nose: Vanilla, caramel, and light oak Palate: Smooth and balanced — caramel, sweet corn, and gentle spice Finish:â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Bourbon

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Diamond Anniversary is a limited-edition Kentucky Straight Bourbon — a blend of rare 13- to 16-year-old whiskies hand-selected by Eddie Russell to honor his father Jimmy Russell's 60 years at the distillery, bottled at 91 proof and scored 97 points by Wine Enthusiast. Released in 2014, Diamond Anniversary marks six decades of Jimmy Russell at Wild Turkey — one of the longest master-distiller tenures in American whiskey. Eddie Russell cherry-picked barrels aged 13 to 16 years, roughly twice the age of the flagship Wild Turkey 101, blending them for a deeper, more oak-drivenâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Diamond Anniversary Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Forgiven Batch 303 is a rare limited bottling born from one of bourbon's most celebrated accidents — a blending error at the Wild Turkey Distillery that combined their Kentucky straight bourbon and straight rye whiskey in the same barrel run, producing a bourbon-rye hybrid that Master Distiller Jimmy Russell decided was too good to discard, resulting in one of the most distinctive and collectible Wild Turkey releases ever produced. Wild Turkey Forgiven was first released in 2013 to commemorate the original blending accident, combining Wild Turkey's signature high-rye bourbon withâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Forgiven Batch 303

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Generations is a barrel-proof Kentucky Straight Bourbon and the 2023 release celebrating three generations of the Russell family — a blend of 9, 12, 14, and 15-year-old bourbons assembled by Jimmy, Eddie, and Bruce Russell and bottled at 120.8 proof, non-chill filtered. Generations marks the first bottling to carry the signatures of all three Russell generations — Jimmy, his son Eddie, and grandson Bruce — on a single label. The blend draws together four age statements from 9 to 15 years, married into one barrel-proof bourbon that runs Wild Turkey's signature high-rye characterâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Generations Kentucky Straight Bourbon 2023 Release

bottles.desc: 70th Anniversary. Jimmy Russell. Wild Turkey — a commemorative release honoring Jimmy Russell’s 70 years as master distiller at Wild Turkey, celebrating one of the most extraordinary tenures in American whiskey history from the man who has been the soul of the Lawrenceburg distillery since 1954. Jimmy Russell began working at Wild Turkey in 1954 and has been master distiller since 1967 — making him the longest-serving active master distiller in American whiskey. His 70-year tenure spans the full arc of American bourbon history: from the pre-revival era of the 1950s and 1960s through the darkâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Jimmy Russell 70th Anniversary Release

bottles.desc: 101 proof. Barrel #03. Dated 3-1-00. Pewter Top. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — the March 1, 2000 dump date makes this Barrel #03 the most recently bottled of the two Pewter Top Kentucky Spirit expressions in the current Wooden Cork collection, bottled at the dawn of the new millennium. The Pewter Top designation identifies a specific packaging era for Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — the decorative pewter stopper format used during a particular production period that distinguishes these expressions from earlier or later packaging formats. Both Pewter Top expressions in the current catalog —â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit (Pewter Top) 3-1-00 Barrel #03 101 Proof

bottles.desc: 101 proof. Single Barrel #5. Dated 9-22-94. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — a September 22, 1994-dated single barrel expression from Wild Turkey’s Kentucky Spirit program, now over 30 years from original bottling and one of the older dated Kentucky Spirit expressions in the Wooden Cork collection. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit is the distillery’s named single barrel program — each bottle carrying the barrel number, warehouse, and dump date that identifies it as a specific individual barrel selection. Barrel #5, dated 9/22/94, is a pre-revival era expression from the mid-1990s when Wild Turkey wasâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit (Pewter Top) 9-22-94 Barrel #5 101 Proof

bottles.desc: 101 proof. Single barrel #5. Distilled September 27, 1994. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — one of the founding-era single barrel releases from one of American whiskey’s earliest single barrel programs. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit launched in the early 1990s as one of the first single barrel bourbons in American whiskey, following Blanton’s 1984 founding of the category. The September 27, 1994 distillation date is documented on the label — a specific day of production at Wild Turkey’s Lawrenceburg, Kentucky distillery during Jimmy Russell’s long tenure as master distiller. Now over 30 years fromâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit (Pewter Top) 9-27-94 Barrel #5 101 Proof

bottles.desc: 101 proof. Barrel #16. Bottled 12-11-95. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — a single barrel expression from Wild Turkey's premium Kentucky Spirit program, aged through the 1990s pre-revival era and bottled at 101 proof on December 11, 1995. The Kentucky Spirit program was Wild Turkey's first single barrel commercial release. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit was launched in the early 1990s as a premium single barrel expression from the Lawrenceburg distillery — predating the craft bourbon revival and representing Wild Turkey's initial foray into individually documented barrel bottling. At 101 proof andâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit 12-11-95 Barrel #16 101 Proof

bottles.desc: 101 proof. Barrel #05. Dated 12-16-95. Pewter Top. With original tag. Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit — the older of the two Pewter Top Kentucky Spirit expressions in the current Wooden Cork collection, dated December 16, 1995, and including the original hang tag that accompanied the Pewter Top format. The December 1995 dump date places Barrel #05 over 4 years before the Y2K-era Barrel #03 (3-1-00) also in the collection. Together they form a two-expression Pewter Top Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit comparison spanning December 1995 through March 2000. Specs Distillery: Wild Turkey Distillery,â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Kentucky Spirit w/Tag (Pewter Top) 12-16-95 Barrel #05 101 Proof

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Master's Distiller Selection 2006 — a limited annual expression selected by Wild Turkey's master distillery team, presented in the wooden gift box that designates this as a premium collector release distinct from the standard Wild Turkey portfolio. The 2006 vintage is now nearly 20 years from its original release. The Master's Distiller Selection program presented specific-year picks from Wild Turkey's aging inventory, curated by the distillery's master distillers and packaged for the collector and gift market. The wooden box presentation distinguishes this as a premium-tierâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Distiller Selection 2006

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Master's Keep 17 Year is the oldest bourbon Wild Turkey had released at its debut — barrels originally aged in a lowland stone warehouse at Old Crow, then moved to a metal-and-wood warehouse, producing a uniquely deep and complex 17-year Kentucky straight bourbon. Tasting Notes Nose: Caramel, vanilla, peaches, apricots, and burnt sugar Palate: Butterscotch, baking spices, blueberry pancakes, fresh maple Finish: Refined, with citrus and toasted oak Specs Distillery: Wild Turkey, Lawrenceburg, Kentucky Style: Kentucky Straight Bourbon (Master's Keep, Batch 1) Age: 17 years Size:â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Keep 17 Year Old Kentucky Straight Bourbon Batch 1 (damaged box

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Master’s Keep Beacon — the most recent annual entry in Wild Turkey’s prestige Master’s Keep program, a blend of aged Wild Turkey bourbons finished in toasted American oak barrels under Master Distiller Eddie Russell’s direction. The Beacon expression uses a secondary toast finishing process — moving mature Wild Turkey bourbon into lightly toasted barrels for additional maturation, drawing out vanilla, caramel, and baking spice character that the toasted stave imparts without the deeper char influence of heavily charred barrels. The result is a softer, more aromatic finish on Wildâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Keep Beacon Bourbon Whiskey

bottles.desc: 17 years. 100 proof. Bottled-in-Bond. Wild Turkey Master's Keep Bottled in Bond — Jimmy Russell's most age-forward BiB expression and the longest-aged Bottled-in-Bond Wild Turkey ever produced. Jimmy Russell has been Wild Turkey's Master Distiller since 1954 — over 70 years at the same distillery, making him the longest-serving Master Distiller in American bourbon history. His son Eddie Russell joined the distillery in 1981 and now co-leads the production program. Together, the Russell family represents an unbroken multi-generational production legacy unmatched in American whiskey. Theâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Keep Bottled in Bond 17 Year Old Kentucky Straight Bourbon

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Master's Keep One is an annual limited Kentucky Straight Bourbon from the Master's Keep series — Eddie Russell's blend of 9- and 10-year barrels with a small batch of 14-year-old whiskey, aged in specially toasted and charred new oak and rested in the Tyrone G rickhouse. Created as a tribute to his father Jimmy Russell's preference for mid-aged bourbon, Master's Keep One marries 9- to 10-year stock with older 14-year whiskey for added depth. The specially toasted-and-charred new oak barrels and the maturation in one of Eddie's favored timber rickhouses give the bourbon its layeredâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Keep One Kentucky Straight Bourbon

bottles.desc: Voyage. Master's Keep. Wild Turkey — an oloroso sherry cask finished expression from Wild Turkey's annual ultra-limited Master's Keep series, presenting aged Kentucky bourbon finished in oloroso sherry casks that add dried fruit, walnut, and rich oxidative complexity to the distillery's characteristic spice and vanilla base. Voyage explores the intersection of Wild Turkey's high-rye bourbon character with the sherry cask finishing that is more associated with Scotch whisky than American bourbon. The oloroso sherry finish adds a layer of confectionery richness — dark fruit, toffee, roastedâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master's Keep Voyage

bottles.desc: Unforgotten. Master's Keep. Wild Turkey — a blend of Kentucky straight bourbon whiskey and Kentucky straight rye whiskey, finished in rye casks, from Wild Turkey's annual ultra-limited Master's Keep series curated by Eddie and Jimmy Russell. Unforgotten is one of the more technically complex expressions in the Master's Keep lineup — a true hybrid of bourbon and rye rather than a single-mash expression, finished in rye barrels to add an additional layer of grain character. The concept honors the distillery's tradition of producing both bourbon and rye from the same Lawrenceburg facility,â¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Master’s Keep Unforgotten Blend of Kentucky Straight Bourbon & Rye Finished in Rye Casks

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Barrel Proof 112.8 Proof is a specific barrel proof batch of Wild Turkey's Rare Breed expression — produced from a blend of 6, 8, and 12-year-old Wild Turkey bourbons, bottled uncut and non-chill filtered at 112.8 proof (56.4% ABV), representing a slightly softer and more approachable barrel proof profile than later higher-proof Rare Breed batches while delivering the signature mature Wild Turkey character that collectors seek. Wild Turkey Rare Breed was introduced in 1991 as one of the first barrel proof bourbons available on the commercial market — predating much ofâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Barrel Proof 112.8 Proof

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Batch WT-03RB at 108.2 proof is one of the most legendary and longest-running batches in the Rare Breed lineup — produced from 2004 through 2013 and highly regarded by collectors for its consistent profile, old-school Wild Turkey character, and the dusty, mature oak complexity that defined barrel proof bourbon before the allocated era drove proof points higher. WT-03RB was the standard Rare Breed batch for nearly a decade — longer than any other single designation in the line. Distilled from 6, 8, and 12-year-old Wild Turkey bourbons, the 108.2 proof is lower than moreâ¦
bottles.name: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Batch WT-03RB 108.2 Proof

bottles.desc: Wild Turkey Rare Breed WT-01-95 — the 1995 batch designation of Wild Turkey's barrel-proof small batch expression, one of the earliest Rare Breed releases produced before the brand's current naming convention. WT-01-95 identifies this as the first batch of 1995 production, from an era when Rare Breed was less widely known and more accessible than current allocated releases. Wild Turkey Rare Breed was introduced in 1991 as a barrel-proof blend of Wild Turkey's 6, 8, and 12-year Kentucky straight bourbon inventory — uncut, unfiltered, presenting the full concentrated character of the high-ryeâ¦

bottles.desc: 14 years. bottles.desc: Woodford Reserve Master's Collection No. 21 Sweet Oak Bourbon is the 21st release in Woodford Reserve's limited-edition Masters Collection — a Kentucky straight bourbon from the signature 72/18/10 mash bill (corn/rye/malted barley) aged in specially selected barrels with a lighter toast and char than standard production, allowing the natural vanillin and sweet aromatic compounds of the wood to infuse the spirit directly rather than through the caramelized char layer, producing the honeycomb, maple, and baked apple profile that differentiates it from Woodford's standard expression. bottles.desc: Woodford Reserve Masters Collection Select American Oak — the 15th release in the Masters Collection: a Kentucky Straight Bourbon matured exclusively in barrels made from Ozark oak — one specific terroir-sourced American white oak rather than the standard mixture of northern, Appalachian, and Ozark oaks that Woodford Reserve normally blends into its barrel production — demonstrating how the geographic origin of the oak itself changes the character of the whiskey. bottles.desc: Woodford Reserve Masters Collection Sonoma Triple Finish — the 19th Masters Collection release: a Kentucky Straight Bourbon that explores the intersection of Kentucky and California wine country, finishing the whiskey in a sequence of three Sonoma County cask types — Pinot Noir barrels, brandy barrels, and former Woodford Reserve bourbon barrels that were subsequently used to age Sonoma red wine before returning to hold whiskey again.
